challenge.title: Korak 8
challenge.description:
Ispod tvog elementa h2, dodaj element paragrafa sa tekstom Hi there! I'm Jane Doe, a passionate writer who finds endless inspiration in the antics of my beloved cat, Mr. Whiskers.

Ispod vašeg paragrafskog elementa, dodajte drugi paragrafski element sa tekstom His playful nature and boundless energy keeps me on my toes. I love him so much.

tests.text: Tvoj prvi deo treba da sadrži tekst Hi there! I'm Jane Doe, a passionate writer who finds endless inspiration in the antics of my beloved cat, Mr. Whiskers. Proveri pažljivo svoju pravopisnost.
Tvoja prva godina bi trebalo da bude postavljena unutar elementa section.
Trebalo bi da imaš drugi paragraf unutar svog elementa section.
Tvoja druga stranica treba da ima tekst His playful nature and boundless energy keeps me on my toes. I love him so much.. Proveri svoju gramatiku pažljivo.

About

Hi there! I'm Jane Doe, a passionate writer who finds endless inspiration in the antics of my beloved cat, Mr. Whiskers.

His playful nature and boundless energy keeps me on my toes. I love him so much.
